name: signoz
description: Official SigNoz plugin for MCP setup, docs, queries, dashboards, and alerts

SIGNOZ_MCP_URL.title: SigNoz MCP endpoint
SIGNOZ_MCP_URL.description: SigNoz Cloud: keep the default and edit the region segment to match yours — https://mcp.<region>.signoz.cloud/mcp (regions: us, us2, eu, eu2, in, in2; find yours under Settings -> Ingestion, or see https://signoz.io/docs/ingestion/signoz-cloud/keys/). After install, run /mcp, select signoz, and complete the Cloud OAuth login. Self-hosted SigNoz: enter your own HTTP /mcp URL, for example http://localhost:8000/mcp.
